response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks explicit experience in IT consulting, UML architecture modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this executive-level role focused on client advisory and German-market compliance.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang libraries
Proven leadership in full-stack development and cross-functional team collaboration
Strong DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure experience across multiple platforms
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML modeling or formal IT architecture design for client systems
Lack of demonstrated experience in IT consulting or client advisory roles
